economic_notes: Nation operates Ingenika Trading Post, Ingenika Logging Ltd., Chu-Cho Enterprises Ltd., Tsay Keh Economic Development Corporation, Tsay Keh Enterprises Ltd., Tsay Keh Holdings Ltd. (dba Tsay Keh Dene Outfitters), and various limited partnerships including Chu Cho Industries LP, Chu Cho Environmental LLP, Chu Cho Forestry LLP, Tsay Keh Developments LP, Claw Mountain Outfitters LLP, Three Feathers LP, Tse Keh Nay LLP.
notes: Large one-time item: forgiveness of Treaty loan of $8,381,924 significantly inflated 2020 revenue and surplus. Nation has complex structure with 4 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 10 government business enterprises/partnerships accounted for under modified equity method. Endowment fund protected amount of $17,838,507 not accessible until Bennett Dam is deactivated. Prior year accumulated surplus restated from $47,869,757 to $49,548,854 per statement. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $4,042,638 + FNHA $1,978,361 + Province of BC $1,777,109 = $7,798,108. Current liabilities include term demand loans $1,545,664 + accounts payable $2,781,593 + replacement reserve $74,519 less long-term debt $159,574 and treaty loan $0. Audit report dated July 5, 2021 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020.
